children.name: TriggerBuild
children.purpose: Create a new build record and run the build pipeline for a given repo and branch
children.behavior: Check no running build for repo+branch, create build record with status 'running', execute compile step, execute test step, package artifacts, update status to 'success' or 'failed', store logs incrementally
children.signature: def TriggerBuild(repo: str, branch: str, config: dict) -> dict

global_vars.description: Create build record, update status, store logs
Store packaged artifacts after successful build

data_operations.description: Check for running builds, create record, update status, append logs

constraints.description: Must check no running build for same repo+branch before creating new build
Artifacts must be stored only on successful build

children.name: CheckBuildStatus
children.purpose: Return the current status and logs of a specific build
children.behavior: Look up build by build_id in builds store, return its status and logs

data_operations.description: Lookup build by build_id and return status and logs

constraints.description: Must return existing build data or error if build_id not found

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns status and logs for valid build_id

children.name: ListBuilds
children.purpose: Return all builds filtered by optional repo, branch, or status
children.behavior: Query builds store with optional filters, return list of build records
children.signature: def ListBuilds(repo: Optional[str] = None, branch: Optional[str] = None, status: Optional[str] = None) -> dict

data_operations.description: Query builds store with optional repo/branch/status filters

constraints.description: Filters must be optional and applied only when provided

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns all builds when no filters provided
Returns filtered builds when filters provided

children.name: CancelBuild
children.purpose: Stop a running build and update its status to 'cancelled'
children.behavior: Look up build by build_id, if status is 'running', stop the build process, update status to 'cancelled', store cancellation log; if already completed, no-op

global_vars.description: Read build record, update status to cancelled, append cancellation log

data_operations.description: Lookup build by build_id, update status to 'cancelled', append log

constraints.description: Only running builds can be cancelled; completed builds are no-op
Cancellation log must be appended to existing logs

governance_notes: Parent global_vars conservation verified: builds (read_write) covered by TriggerBuild (read_write), CheckBuildStatus (read), ListBuilds (read), CancelBuild (read_write). artifacts (read_write) covered by TriggerBuild (write). Note: artifacts read is not required by any child; parent's read requirement on artifacts is not explicitly needed by children based on current signatures. If parent requires artifacts read, it must be added to a child (e.g., CheckBuildStatus or ListBuilds). Currently, no child reads artifacts, so the read side of artifacts is unassigned. This is a gap that must be resolved by adding artifacts read to an appropriate child or documenting that parent's read on artifacts is handled elsewhere.
